dialogue: Today is very sunny.
Let's go on another field trip!
Hiya kids! Is everyone ready for the field trip?
It's perfect for learning about the world.
We can get started!
Very good!
Time for more questions...
I love field trips!
We discover many things.
Like this beautiful butterfly!
Your answers are correct.
You learn very quickly!
I love going outside when the weather is good.
Field trips are amazing!
You know a lot of things already!
Did you know ? Biology is my favourite topic.
It teaches you about plants and animals!
Do you like biology?
That's true!
The field trip is almost over, sadly.
Only a few more questions now.
You are my best student!
I had fun on the field trip!
Show me if you remember everything we learned about.
Incredible! You did it!
Did I make the questions too easy?
Of course not, you are the best!
Thank you for joining me on this field trip. I hope you liked it!
